The Dubai Press Club (DPC) hosted today the first session of a series of dialogue sessions bringing together political figures, media leaders, editors in chief, writers, academics and content creators from the UAE and across the Arab world to discuss the evolving political, security and economic landscape, and its impact on Gulf development as well as regional and international stability. First Session hosted Emirati writer and journalist Mohammed Al Hammadi.

🔴ELIMINATED: 250+ Hezbollah terrorists and commanders were eliminated across Beirut, the Beqaa and southern Lebanon, during the largest strike conducted in Lebanon.

Among the terrorists eliminated:
• Hassan Mustafa Nasser - Responsible for smuggling and storing weapons in Lebanon.
•  Ali Qassem, Abu Ali Abbas, and Ali Hijazi • Responsible for gathering the intelligence assessment on Israel, including the development of a target bank for strikes and the collection of intelligence.
• Abu Muhammad Habib - Throughout the war, and particularly during Operation Northern Arrows, he was involved in launching missiles toward Israel.

🔴ELIMINATED: Hezbollah terrorists who were identified en route to carry out an imminent attack against IDF troops.

In a separate incident, IDF soldiers located a terrorist cell planning to attack troops using explosive drones. One of the terrorists was identified and eliminated in a precise strike.

Additionally, a loaded launcher aimed at Israel was identified and struck.

Dubai Healthcare City Authority launches measures to support its partners and strengthen opportunities for sustainable growth. The measures include a waiver of re-instatement fees and late renewal penalties for commercial licences renewed between 1 April and 30 June 2026. Businesses are also given the option to settle renewal fees in instalments through structured payment plans, including post-dated cheques, extending until 30 September 2026.
https://mediaoffice.ae/en/news/2026/april/13-04/dubai-healthcare-city-authority-launches-measures-to-support-its-partners

سلطة مدينة دبي الطبية تطلق مجموعة من التسهيلات دعماً لشركائها وتعزيزاً لفرص النمو المستدام. وتتضمن التسهيلات المُقدمة من سلطة مدينة دبي الطبية إعفاءً من رسوم إعادة التفعيل وغرامات التأخير على الرخص التجارية المُجدَّدة خلال الفترة من 1 أبريل حتى 30 يونيو 2026، كما تتيح للشركات سداد رسوم التجديد على أقساط وفق خطط دفع مُنظَّمة، تشمل شيكات مؤجلة، تمتد حتى 30 سبتمبر 2026.

Dubai Healthcare City Authority launches measures to support its partners and strengthen opportunities for sustainable growth. The measures include a waiver of re-instatement fees and late renewal penalties for commercial licences renewed between 1 April and 30 June 2026. Businesses are also given the option to settle renewal fees in instalments through structured payment plans, including post-dated cheques, extending until 30 September 2026.

Donald Trump’s sudden decision to announce a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz continues a costly and failed path that began on the battlefield, reached a dead end at the negotiating table, and has now arrived at a stage between war and peace – neither a ceasefire nor all-out war, but “controlled pressure” with uncontrolled risks. America’s efforts to change the equation against Iran failed one after another: direct military pressure achieved nothing; the diplomatic path and Islamabad Talks led to no tangible result. Now, Washington assumes that a naval blockade could be the third option. While the Strait of Hormuz is a vital energy chokepoint, a naval blockade of the strait can backfire agai

🔴ELIMINATED: A terrorist who took part in the abduction of Hersh Goldberg-Polin, Alon Ohel, Eliya Cohen, and Or Levy from a bomb shelter in Re’im.

IDF troops, together with the ISA, eliminated an armed Hamas terrorist cell.

Following intelligence assessments, it was determined that during the strike, the IDF eliminated the terrorist Ali Sami Mohammad Shakra, who infiltrated Israel during the October 7 massacre and took part in the abduction of Hersh Goldberg-Polin, Alon Ohel, Eliya Cohen, and Or Levy from a bomb shelter in Re’im.

During the strike, the IDF eliminated Mohammad Mabhouh and Mohammad Fuad Jaser Sayyid. Both terrorists took part in the holding of Avinatan Or in Hamas captivity.

🎥WATCH: Weapons cache discovered inside a hospital used by Hezbollah for terrorist activity in Bint Jbeil. 

Several Hezbollah terrorists were identified conducting surveillance from a hospital window and firing toward IDF soldiers in the area, and following identification of the threat, IDF soldiers eliminated the terrorists. 

Additionally, ~ 20 terrorists were precisely eliminated within the hospital compound.

Among the uses identified within the hospital compound:
- The transfer and storage of weapons within the hospital compound
- ⁠The use of hospital facilities as observation posts, concealment positions, and shelter for operatives
